summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gitopedia initial build - all backend API endpoints and frontend pages functioning correctly with fresh database
passed_tests: Backend /api/stats endpoint returns correct structure (total_reports: 0, total_users: 0)
Backend /api/reports returns empty list for fresh DB
Backend /api/reports/check validates GitHub URL format correctly
Backend /api/auth/verify endpoint exists and rejects invalid tokens
Frontend landing page loads with hero section, URL input, and navigation
Frontend auth page loads with login/signup tabs and form functionality
Frontend browse page loads and shows no-reports state correctly
Frontend navigation between pages works (logo -> home, Browse Reports link, Sign Up button -> auth page)
Frontend credits page redirects to auth if not logged in
